titleStmt.title: SII 9.550: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 550. (A.R. No. 182 of 1924.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE THIRD PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Śaka 1454, Nandana, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 10, Mandavāra, Rōhiṇī-nakshatra, corresponding to A.D. 1532 July 27 Saturday in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records the gift made by the king on the day of his coronation in the year Virōdhi, Kārtika, ba. 5, corresponding to A.D. 1529 October 21, Thursday, in the presence of the god Kālahastīśvara at Kālahasti, of seven and three-fourths villages (named) and the export and import duties from certain specified ports, for worship and offerings to the god on festival days. It mentions the levy of tribute from Tiruvaḍi (Travancore), the subjugation of Tumbichchi and Sāḷva-Nāyaka, the taking (in marriage) of the Pāṇḍya princess, and the planting of a pillar of victory on the bank of the Tāmbraparṇī river by the king. The king's birth-star is stated to be Mṛigaśīrsha. The inscription is written in Nāgarī characters and Kannaḍa language.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraAccutarāyamahārāyaru prithvīrājiyaṁ māḍuttalu yiralāgi śakābda 1454 saṁdu mele naḍava naṁdanasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa bahula 10 maṁdavāradalu rohiṇi nakṣatradalu Accutarāyamahārāyaru virodhisaṁvatsaradakārtika bahula 5 lu kālahāstige vijayamāḍisi kālahastīśvarana seveyanu māḍi śrīkālahastīśvarana sannidhiyalu paṭṭāabhiṣekavanu māḍikoṁḍu melunāḍa dhoregaḷu nuggehaḷḷi rāyaṇarājagaḷu Ummattūru mallarājagaḷu veṁkaṭādrināyaka muṁtāda pāḷayada nāyakamakkaḷanu śaraṇāgatarādavaranu pālisi bhūgatarāda manneyaranu rakṣisi tiruvaḍirājyakke manneyarunu daḷavāḍavanu kaḷuhisalāgi
tiruvaḍiya kayyalu kappavanu tegadukoṁḍu pāṁḍ Ayarājana kumāratiyanu Īsikoṁḍu tuṁmicyanu sāluvanāyakaranu Ājñeyanu māḍisi tāṁbraparṇiyalu jayastaṁbhavanu hākisi śrīkālaharatīśvaradevarige sarmīpasta toṁḍamanāḍu sīme toṁḍamanāḍugrāma 1 ke rekhe honnu 1900 Ūraṁdūrugrama 1 ke rekhe honnu 600 kaṁdāḍe yidaravoḷagaṇa halli kumārakālahastiyāda modagalla pāḷaya saha grāma 1 kke rekhe honnu 200 visuravoṁka grāma 1 ke rekhe honnu 110 māṁbākka grāma 1 ke rekhe honnu 90 Aṁtu toṁḍamanāḍusīme rekhe honnu 2000 puḍanāḍasīme voḷagaṇa punaṁpāka grāma 1 ke rekhe honnu 210 śrotriyasīme voḷagaṇa pinasiṁgamāle grāma 1 ke rekhe honnu 40 gaṁgalappaṁḍigrāma 1 kke rekhe honnu 50
Aṁtu grāma 2 ke resve honnu 200 svāmiya janmanakṣatra mṛgaśirānakṣatradalu śrīkālahastīśvaradevarige pulaṁgugāpuge nityasahasranāmārcanegū samarpista paḍanāḍa suṁkayeṁkolanuvallūru māḍa nallūru Aṁjūru talapulakaṇame Aṁjaṁveḍa karakaṭṭaṁbāḍige mūḍalu rāllakāluve Eṁba hoḷegu maṇḍūru gūḍalikoṭṭe voṁkkāḍu duggarājapaṭṭaṇada kappalijoṁgu saṁbānu muṁtāda Ūru megaḷa Ettumati yarakkumatiṁ saha paḍanāḍa suṁka rekhe honnu 1200 Aṁtu grāma 7 ... ku suṁka rekhe honnu 4500 svāmi paṭṭava kaṭṭikoṁḍadu Ārabhyavāgi naṁdanasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa bahuḷa 10 nilege kāṇikeyāgi samarpista honnu ¥ 121 Ø 2 cinnada paṭṭe 5 ke tūṁka 1 Eḷu nileya gopurada tiruppaṇigekallu haccista honnu
7250 paṭṭe haccaḍa 25 paṭṭe śīre 31 Aṁgavastra 5 kulāya 6 śrīgaṁdhada cekke 16 karpūrada kudiru 6 kastūri kaḷaṁju 20 kuṁkumada hū kaḷaṁju 170 pannīra ceṁbu 46 cinnada kaṁbi jñānacintāmaṇi pustaka 1 cinnada hū tūṁka 2 svāmi samarpista grāmaṁgaḷigeU suṁkegeU śrīkāḷahastīśvaradevarige nityappaḍi Acyutarāyamahārāyara Avasarake naḍadu vaha śrīgaṁdhada hala 10 kastūriya kaḷaṁju . karpūrada kaḷaṁju 1 kuṁkumada hū kaḷaṁju . taṭṭapalagu kaḷaṁju . pannīru ceṁbu 2 tirumāle joḍu 10 naṁdādīvige 2 rātridīvige 100 mahānaivedyada harivāṇa 96 Akkāḷimaḍe harivāṇa 2 Appada harivāṇa 1 Atirasada harivāṇa 1 vaḍeya harivāṇa 1 sukhiyana harivāṇa 1 piṭṭu hari
vāṇa 1 Aḍake 50 Ele 100 Aruvattamūvarigaṁ cilaṁdi Aruvānigaṁ tirumāle joḍu 70 rātridīvige 70 mahānaivedyada harivāṇa 70 tirumaleśvara liṁgake tirumāle joḍu 2 rātridīvige 22 mahānaivedyada harivāṇa 4 paṇiśvara liṁgakke dīvigakke Eṇṇe paḍi 1 mahānaivedyada harivāṇa 4 Amāvāsye dina kālahastīśvararu Avadharisva mahānaivedya harivāṇa 10 Appada harivāṇa 1 Atirasada harivāṇa 1 vaḍeya harivāṇa 1 sugiyana harivāṇa 1 piU harivāṇa Aḍike 50 Ele 100 māsa tirunāḷu Eṁṭu harināḷalu Avadharisva Appada harivāṇa Atirasada harivāṇa 1 vaḍeya harivāṇa 1 sugiyana harivāṇa 1 piṭṭu harivāṇa 1 Aḍake 10 Ele 20 makarasaṁkramaṇada marudina ppāruveṁ
ṭeyāgi giripradakṣiṇe māḍuvāga Accutarāyamahārāyara toṁṭadoḷagaṇa maṁṭapadali bijayamāḍi Avadharisva mahānaivedyada harivāṇa 20 Appada harivāṇa 1 Aḍike 10 yele 20 cittire tirunāḷali toṁḍamanāḍige bijayamāḍi Ali Avadharisva mahānaivedyada harivāṇa 100 Appada harivāṇa 1 Atirasada harivāṇa 1 vaḍeya harivāṇa 1 sugiyana harivāṇa 1 piṭṭu harivāṇa 1 Aḍike 500 yele 1000 puḷugugāppuge tiṁgaḷu tiṁgaḷige mrigaśirānakṣatradalli Abhiṣekakke jenutuppa paḍi . sakkare hala 15 gaṁdada hala 10 karpūrada kudiru 1 kastūri kaḷaṁju 1 pannīru ceṁbu 1 taṭṭu punagu kaḷaṁju 40 mahānaivedyada harivāṇa 20 Appada harivāṇa 1 pāṇiśvaraliṁgakke samarpista paḍḍanāḍa
sīme voḷagaṇa kanupura grāma 1 kke rekhe honnu 100 ke naḍadu baha nityapaḍi Abhiṣekakke jenutuppa paḍi . sakare hala 10 hālu paḍi 1 gaṁdhada hala 1 tirumāle joḍu 10 naṁdādīvige 2 rātridīvige 50 mahānaivedyada harivāṇa 4 yī mariyādele Ācaṁdrārkasthāyi Āgi naḍasuUdu darmmakartakke baha cāturbhāgakke baha prasādavanu svajjāyagaḷū brāṁharige satravāgi yikkabahudu . panmāheśvararakṣe . Idaralli palavekkūruḍeyāri kāḷattiyāneya maga bhāṁḍārige svāmi Acyutarāyamahārāyaru tamma Ubhayada naivedyada viḍuvina vīḷukkāḍu prasāda harivāṇada yeraḍu harivāṇa prasādavanu bagege Oṁdoṁdu kajāyavanu koṭṭu baraheḷi Adhikāri kuppayyagū sthānadavarigū śenubovarigū pālisi kalu hākista rāyasta prakāra naṁdanasaṁvatsarada mārga
śira śu 10 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraAccutarāyamahārāyaru tirukāḷahastiya pārupatyada kuppayyagū sthānadavarigū senabovarigū nirūpa naṁma Ubhayada naivedya vi vana viḷukkāḍu prasādada harivāṇadali cikkatirumalarājara senabova cāṁdārige dināyalū Eraḍu harivāṇa prasādavanu bagege Oṁdoṁdu kajāyavanu koḍuUdu tappade koḍuUdu cittayisteU śrīvirūpākṣa . yī rāyasada prakāra satra naḍavudu . senabovara cāṁdārige Accutarāyamahārāyara Ubhayava naivedyada viṭṭavana viḷukkāḍu prasādada harivāṇadali Eraḍu harivāṇa prasādavanu bageke Oṁdoṁdu kajjāyavāgi Appa voṁdu Atirasa voṁdu vaḍeyoṁdu sukhiya voṁdu piṭṭoṁdu dināyalū cāṁdāri
putrapotrapāraṁpariyalu Ācaṁdrārkasthāyiyāgi naḍasaluḷḷavaru . yidu panmāheśvararakṣe .
Digital edition of SII 9.550 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
